kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=demo, url=https://reqres.in, headers={'x-api-key': 'reqres_49137685aceb4f4bba7bed2aa87f06fe', 'User-Agent': 'RobotFramework API Test'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://reqres.in/api/users?page=2 path_url=/api/users?page=2 headers={'User-Agent': 'RobotFramework API Test', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'x-api-key': 'reqres_49137685aceb4f4bba7bed2aa87f06fe'} body=None

/Users/vindyadiddeniya/Documents/projects/smart-meter-automation/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'reqres.in'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
